summary: Sorrel & Stone, a warm rustic-editorial website for a farm-to-table restaurant in the converted feed mill at Harlow Creek, with a seasonal menu, grower profiles, private events and reservations.

pages.title: Home
pages.purpose: Brand introduction, seasonal ethos, featured dishes and calls to reserve.

pages.title: Our Story
pages.purpose: Origin of the restaurant, philosophy, timeline and the people in the kitchen.

pages.title: Menu
pages.purpose: The current seasonal menu by course plus Sunday harvest lunch and tasting options.

pages.title: Farms
pages.purpose: Profiles of the local growers, farmers, fishers and foragers who supply the kitchen.

pages.title: Events
pages.purpose: Private dining in The Hayloft with event types, packages and FAQs.

pages.title: Visit
pages.purpose: Opening hours, location, directions, reservation form and house notes.
